payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Do not overwrite either fact without clarification; keep the relationship ambiguous for now.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input conflicts with the existing memory and neither relation can be safely treated as current without additional clarification.

memory_cards.statement: Sara is described inconsistently as both my daughter and my niece; the relationship is unresolved and should be treated as ambiguous until clarified.

details: Conflict identified between two family relations for the same person.
No durable update committed due to ambiguity.

repair_options: Confirm whether Sara is your daughter, your niece, or another relation.
If one statement was mistaken, explicitly correct the older memory before committing the new one.
